mainEntity.name: What documents do I need to get started with a mortgage in Curaçao?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most clients only need a few basics to begin: passport, proof of address, income documents, and recent bank statements. We provide a personalized checklist based on your situation — local income, foreign income, rental income, or self-employment — so you always know exactly what to prepare. <div class="framer-8bZeq framer-PyPhC framer-UaE14 framer-43ss71 framer-v-z48pug" data-framer-name="Primary Closed" data-highlight="true" tabindex="0" style="background-color:var(--token-1980655a-21b5-4c9d-8c
